# Skills

This directory contains Copilot skill definitions for the generated project.
Each subdirectory holds a `SKILL.md` that teaches the AI coding agent
domain-specific knowledge.

## Available Skills

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `clean-architecture/` | Layer hierarchy and dependency rules |
| `frontend-react-stack/` | React + TypeScript + Vite + shadcn/ui conventions |
| `naming-registry/` | Project naming and registry conventions |
| `python-conventions/` | Python coding standards and patterns |
| `testing-conventions/` | Test structure, naming, and coverage rules |
